author: George Tasan
description: Synchronizes approved Markdown notes from an Obsidian vault into a MERCENAI knowledge base. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: MERCENAI
manifest.description: Synchronizes approved Markdown notes from your vault into a MERCENAI knowledge base.
manifest.name: MERCENAI Vault Sync

name: MERCENAI Vault Sync

releases.author: xmachinesai
releases.description: Full-vault synchronization with server-safe batching, protocol compatibility checks, and complete manifest handling for large Obsidian vaults.
releases.name: MERCENAI Vault Sync 0.1.2

releases.author: xmachinesai
releases.description:
Obsidian Community review compatibility release.

- Updates the manifest description to follow the Community directory requirements.
releases.name: MERCENAI Vault Sync 0.1.1

releases.author: xmachinesai
releases.description:
Initial public release of MERCENAI Vault Sync.

- Connects an Obsidian vault to a selected MERCENAI knowledge base.
- Synchronizes non-empty Markdown notes through Obsidian's official Vault API.
- Automatically resynchronizes after Markdown files are created, modified, renamed, or deleted.
- Stores the MERCENAI connection token with Obsidian SecretStorage.
releases.name: MERCENAI Vault Sync 0.1.0
